name: GLOBAL PAYMENTS INC
business: Global Payments Inc. is a payments technology company that delivers innovative software and services globally. It provides payment processing, merchant acceptance solutions, business management software, and value-added services. The company serves merchants, financial institutions, and businesses worldwide.

exposures.sentence: Through our Merchant Solutions segment, we provide payments technology and software solutions globally.

We also integrate our capabilities with shopping carts, ordering platforms, marketplaces and other digitally-oriented businesses through the same embedded payment stack we leverage with more traditional, vertically-specific independent software vendors.

Our comprehensive offerings include, but are not limited to, authorization, settlement and funding services, customer support, chargeback resolution, reconciliation and dispute management services, terminal rental, sales and deployment, payment security services, consolidated billing and reporting.

Delivering innovative commerce enablement solutions globally to expand our position as a client-centric, product-led company, including investing in AI capabilities and strategic partnerships to position our platforms to support agent-driven commerce

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Worldpay and divestiture of Issuer Solutions
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we acquired 100% of Worldpay Holdco, LLC (Worldpay) from Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (FIS) and affiliates of GTCR LLC (GTCR) ("Worldpay Acquisition") and divested our Issuer Solutions business to FIS.

In September 2025, we completed the sale of Heartland Payroll Solutions, Inc. ("Payroll Solutions"), our payroll business included in our Merchant Solutions segment prior to disposition, to Acrisure, LLC ("Acrisure") for approximately $1.1 billion, including up to $75 million of contingent consideration.
In December 2024, we completed the sale of AdvancedMD, Inc. ("AdvancedMD") for approximately $1.1 billion and up to $125 million of contingent consideration.

catalysts.event: Segment realignment to align with new organizational structure
catalysts.sentence: Therefore, beginning in the first quarter of 2026, our reportable segments will align with that revised structure.
